results.message:
Database Error in model mart_headcount (models\marts\mart_headcount.sql)
  function round(double precision, integer) does not exist
  LINE 21:     round(avg(base_salary), 2) as avg_salary,
               ^
  HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  compiled code at target\run\hr_payroll\models\marts\mart_headcount.sql
results.compiled_code:
select
    department,
    job_level,
    state,
    gender,
    performance_rating,
    count(*) as total_employees,
    sum(is_active) as active_employees,
    count(*) - sum(is_active) as terminated_employees,
    round(avg(base_salary), 2) as avg_salary,
    round(avg(age), 1) as avg_age
from "hr_dwh"."public"."raw_employees"
group by department, job_level, state, gender, performance_rating

results.message:
Database Error in model mart_payroll (models\marts\mart_payroll.sql)
  function round(double precision, integer) does not exist
  LINE 18:     round(sum(gross_salary), 2) as total_gross,
               ^
  HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  compiled code at target\run\hr_payroll\models\marts\mart_payroll.sql
results.compiled_code:
select
    department,
    job_level,
    year,
    month,
    count(distinct employee_id) as employees_paid,
    round(sum(gross_salary), 2) as total_gross,
    round(sum(federal_tax), 2) as total_federal_tax,
    round(sum(state_tax), 2) as total_state_tax,
    round(sum(social_security), 2) as total_social_security,
    round(sum(medicare), 2) as total_medicare,
    round(sum(total_deductions), 2) as total_deductions,
    round(sum(net_pay), 2) as total_net_pay,
    round(avg(gross_salary), 2) as avg_gross_salary
from "hr_dwh"."public"."fact_payroll"
group by department, job_level, year, month

results.message:
Database Error in model stg_employees (models\staging\stg_employees.sql)
  column " " does not exist
  LINE 11:     first_name || " " || last_name as full_name,
                             ^
  compiled code at target\run\hr_payroll\models\staging\stg_employees.sql
results.compiled_code:
select
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    first_name || " " || last_name as full_name,
    department,
    job_title,
    job_level,
    base_salary,
    base_salary / 12 as monthly_salary,
    state,
    hire_date,
    termination_date,
    is_active,
    performance_rating,
    gender,
    age
from "hr_dwh"."public"."raw_employees"
where employee_id is not null
  and base_salary > 0
  and age between 18 and 70
